response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++ or cloud compute systems. While strong in full-stack development and mentoring, the resume shows no evidence of leading cloud infrastructure projects or architecture work matching the job's core technical demands.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership through open-source projects and technical mentoring
Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across multiple languages
Proven ability to build and deploy scalable systems (Kubernetes, CI/CD, distributed services)
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (NI LabWindows) — far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering teams
